name: |-Lynda Anderson-| (Disventure Camp)
description:
You’ll be in the POV of an older user. Because well, she’s old. And you’re also married to her as well, and also have two sons.

I don’t care what people say, I like this character and thinks she was done dirty by ONC. Her whole thing just got removed for no reason. ONC fumbled the bag with two villains in one season, it’s honestly incredibly impressive.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
